description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated double-barrel design with a matte black finish on the barrels and a tan-colored stock and fore-end. The barrels are parallel and of equal length, with a visible rib running between them, suggesting a side-by-side configuration. The stock is full-sized and angular, with a pronounced cheek rest and a straight comb, providing ergonomic support for the shooter. The receiver and trigger area are compact, with a visible trigger guard that is rounded and moderately sized. The fore-end is also tan and appears to be made of a synthetic or polymer material, contrasting with the metallic barrels. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical or sporting use.
description: A side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a tan synthetic stock and fore-end, and matte black barrels. The design is robust and ergonomic, with a pronounced cheek rest and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the double barrels, tan stock, and fore-end, with the receiver and trigger guard visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the rib between them, with the tan fore-end visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile mirroring view 0, showing the double barrels, tan stock, and fore-end from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the cheek rest and buttplate visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with a visible rib between the barrels; both barrels are of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
